title: Marbella Private Boat Hire Hen Do: Costs & Tips 2026
html:
For an unforgettable hen do in Marbella, private boat hire offers luxury, privacy and the sparkling Mediterranean. Departing from Puerto Banús or Marbella Marina, prices start at around €2,500 for a half-day trip on a premium motor yacht. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local skippers and boats, making it simple to rent a boat for your celebration.

Where to set off in Marbella?

Choose from Puerto Banús, Marbella Marina, Cabopino Port, Estepona Marina or Sotogrande. Each offers easy access to the Costa del Sol’s finest anchorages. Puerto Banús is the most glamorous, packed with superyachts and designer boutiques. Marbella Marina sits right in the centre, while Cabopino provides a quieter, more natural setting near the Artola dunes. Estepona and Sotogrande to the west are ideal for longer cruises toward Gibraltar.

Which boat to rent for a hen do?

  1. Sunseeker 68 Sport, a sleek motor yacht with a large sunpad and flybridge, accommodating up to 12 guests, from €4,500 for four hours. View this motor yacht on BoatHire24.
  2. Azimut 55 Fly, a spacious flybridge model perfect for sunbathing and socialising, up to 10 guests, from €3,200 for half a day.
  3. Lagoon 46 Catamaran, stable and wide, with a shallow draft for anchoring near the beach, up to 12 guests, from €3,000 for four hours.
  4. Axopar 45 Cabin, an open, sporty boat with a cabin and a large aft deck, ideal for a younger group, up to 10 guests, from €2,500 for half a day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a hen do in Marbella?

Prices vary by boat type and duration, but expect to pay €250, €1,000 per person for a private hire. A shared sunset cruise can be found for around €60, €100 per person, but private is more common for hen dos. For a small motorboat (e.g. Axopar) for half a day, budget €2,500, €3,500. A catamaran full-day hire runs €4,000, €6,000, while a crewed superyacht with skipper and host can be €8,000, €12,000 for a full day. To compare verified boat listings, rent a boat in Marbella via BoatHire24.

  • Shared tour: €60, €100 per person for 2, 3 hours
  • Small motorboat half-day: €2,500, €3,500 for up to 10 guests
  • Catamaran full-day: €4,000, €6,000 for up to 12 guests
  • Crewed yacht full-day: €8,000, €12,000 for up to 12 guests

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

No, you can hire a boat with a qualified skipper and no licence is required for passengers. Most private charters include a licensed captain and crew, so you can relax. For bareboat hire (self-drive), a valid Spanish recreational boating licence or an ICC endorsed for inland waters is needed. The operator will confirm exact requirements when you book.

For the best weather and calm seas, book between May and October. In July and August, the prevailing levante wind can pick up in the afternoon, so many skippers recommend morning departures (9am, 2pm) for smoother cruising around the Marbella coast.

At a glance

  • Price band: €2,500, €12,000 for private hire
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4 hours to full day (8 hours)
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on most boats
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can we bring our own food and drink on board?

Yes, most charter operators allow you to bring catering and beverages; some offer optional catering packages.

What is the cancellation policy for a private hire?

Policies vary, but many skippers offer full refunds up to 14 days before departure; check the listing carefully before booking.

How many guests can we bring to a hen do on a boat?

Most motor yachts and catamarans in Marbella accommodate 10 to 12 passengers; some larger vessels can take up to 18.

Is swimming and snorkelling included?

Yes, the skipper will anchor at a sheltered beach or bay such as Playa del Ancón, and snorkel gear is usually provided.

Whether you are celebrating a hen do, a birthday, or simply a luxurious day at sea, Marbella’s coastline offers the perfect backdrop. From the glamour of Puerto Banús to the calmer waters near Cabopino, private boat hire gives you freedom and privacy. Compare options and browse the listings on BoatHire24; owners can also list their vessels to reach groups planning special events.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
